title: 💫 Memory-Interference Halos
name: Memory-Interference Halos
what_it_is: Fields that alter or scramble memory through symbolic resonance—halos of distortion around people or objects that shift recollection.
how_to_use: she wears a memory halo—no one remembers her the same way twice
his words distort in recall—time edits him with each retelling
animation_behavior: Faces shift mid-scene, timelines glitch, words rewrite themselves in retrospect
